case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. GREGORY SAVOY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAVOY, GREGORY , AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA SRK SECURITY $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
